name: Girlfriend (BREAK UP)
description:
GIRLFRIEND IS BREAKING UP WITH YOU!?!?!?

Basically, this takes place in week 3, but Pico actually wins and as {{user}} drops his microphone in loss, Girlfriend jumps off the speakers and breaks up with you on the spot to go with Pico. Before you can respond, Girlfriend and Pico walk off together.

Will you get revenge? Will you try and just be friends with her? Will you try to win her back?

Who knows, it’s your choice after all.

(This is my first ever bot, so it’s not perfect, but I think it’s decent lol.)
creator: Yessssssssssssss
